## What's Changed
* Set up repository with Giant Swarm conventions by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/1
* Rename ClaudeMCPServer to KlausMCPServer and remove ClaudePlugin CRD by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/8
* Implement klaus-operator for dynamic instance management by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/9
* Update module github.com/mark3labs/mcp-go to v0.44.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/13
* Update k8s modules by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/11
* Add KlausPersonality CRD for instance templating by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/12
* Add KlausMCPServer CRD with Secret injection by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/14
* Add image field to KlausPersonality and KlausInstance by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/17
* Add workspace git clone with credential support and hardening by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/18
* Update alpine/git Docker tag to v2.52.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/19
* chore: align Go toolchain to go 1.25.0 with toolchain go1.26.0 by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/23
* chore(deps): update dependency architect to v6.13.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/22
* fix: restructure CI for faster PR builds and add multiarch support by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/25
* Replace KlausPersonality CRD with OCI-based personalities and adopt klaus-oci by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/27
* Add auto-release workflow for automatic patch version tagging by @teemow in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/28

## New Contributors
* @renovate[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/pull/13

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/giantswarm/klaus-operator/commits/v0.0.1
